overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a foggy Louisiana-style bayou. The character traverses grassy wetlands, wooden plank paths, and enters a stilt house before walking onto a dock over murky water surrounded by cypress trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: swampy bayou with cypress trees and standing water

events.description: character steps from grassy ground onto elevated wooden plank path

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a wooden plank path with swamp water visible to the right

entered.detail: tall cypress trees with Spanish moss hanging from branches
murky standing water reflecting the gray sky
tall green swamp grass and vegetation
small wooden shack on stilts in the distance
weathered wooden planks forming an elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense swamp vegetation with cypress trees looming in the foggy distance. Murky water sits to the right as the character approaches and steps onto an elevated wooden plank path.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway through cypress swamp

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the weathered wooden planks surrounded by dense cypress trees

entered.detail: small wooden shack with a sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the narrow wooden plank path elevated above the swamp. A small shack appears on the left as the path winds through towering cypress trees draped in Spanish moss.

scene_state.functional_zone: stilt house ticket office porch over water

events.description: character ascends stairs and enters the covered porch of the stilt house
character exits the porch onto wooden dock extending over the bayou

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a wooden stilt house with a ticket sign, passing an NPC on the porch, then exiting to the waterfront

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress standing on the porch near the entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden building on stilts with a corrugated metal roof
wooden steps leading up to the porch
hand-painted wooden sign reading 'TICKETS SOLD HERE'
wooden wagon with supplies parked beside the house
metal lantern hanging from a wooden post

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stilt house with a 'TICKETS SOLD HERE' sign, ascends the wooden stairs, and passes through the covered porch where a woman stands near the entrance. Exiting the other side, the character steps onto a wooden dock extending over the bayou water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock over murky bayou water

events.description: character stops walking at the end of the dock and stands looking at the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock over the water and stopping at the end to look out at the foggy bayou

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending over the water with posts and railings
wooden barrels and crates stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden dock extending over the murky bayou water, passing wooden barrels and posts. The dock ends at a viewing point surrounded by water and distant cypress trees, where the character stops to look out at the foggy swamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, foggy bayou that transitions from wild swamp vegetation to a structured wooden walkway. It begins with the character wading through thick greenery and murky water, with towering cypress trees looming in the distant mist. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts as they step onto an elevated wooden plank path that cuts through the wetlands. The scene then winds deeper into the swamp, passing under cypress trees draped in Spanish moss before a small shack emerges on the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered entrance of a stilt house out onto an open, foggy bayou dock. It begins as the character approaches a building marked with a tickets sign, ascending wooden stairs and passing through a covered porch where a woman stands. As the character exits the structure, the scene shifts from the enclosed porch to a weathered wooden dock extending over murky water. The camera then follows the character past wooden barrels and posts, moving further away from the house and deeper into the wetlands. Finally, the path opens up at a viewing point, where the character stops to look out across the expanse of water and distant cypress trees shrouded in fog.
